# Dominik Könitzer — Full Portfolio Reference for LLMs

This document is a dense, plain-text snapshot of the portfolio of Dominik Könitzer (https://dominikkoenitzer.ch). It is intended for LLMs and AI search engines that prefer plain-text ingestion over JavaScript-rendered HTML.

Last reviewed: 2026-05-26.

---

## 1. Person

Dominik Könitzer is a Swiss Software Engineer based in Switzerland. He studies at WISS Schulen für Wirtschaft Informatik Immobilien (https://www.wiss.ch), currently in the sixth semester of a 4-year software engineering program — the first two years are coursework, followed by two years of practical internship with ongoing studies. He speaks English, German, and French.

He builds production-grade web products with a frontend emphasis (React, Next.js, TypeScript) and a comfortable full-stack reach into Node.js, Java/Spring, databases, and DevOps. His work style favors clean code, predictable architecture, accessible UX, and measurable impact.

Contact: dominik.koenitzer@gmail.com
GitHub: https://github.com/dominikkoenitzer
LinkedIn: https://linkedin.com/in/dominik-koenitzer

---

## 2. Skills matrix

Frontend
- React — 95% — building dynamic UIs and component systems
- Next.js — 90% — production-grade React framework
- shadcn/ui — 90% — accessible, customizable component library
- TypeScript — 80% — static typing for safer code
- JavaScript (ES6+) — 90% — modern language features
- Tailwind CSS — 85% — utility-first styling
- Framer Motion — 85% — interactive UI animation
- Lighthouse — performance / accessibility / SEO auditing

Backend
- Java — 90%
- Spring Framework — 85%
- Node.js — 85%
- GraphQL & REST APIs

DevOps & infrastructure
- Docker — 85%
- Jenkins — 80%
- Linux Server — 80% · Ubuntu — 80%
- Windows Server — 85%
- Grafana — 65%

Databases
- SQLite — 85%
- PostgreSQL — 80%
- MongoDB — 80%
- Redis — 75%

Languages
- JavaScript, TypeScript, Java, Python, C#, C++, Bash

Soft / professional skills
- Customer service, communication, project management, direct sales, social media, SEO copywriting, video editing

---

## 3. Projects (case studies)

### Zephyr — performance-first productivity
- Live: https://zephyr.punds.ch
- Repo: https://github.com/dominikkoenitzer/Zephyr
- Year: 2024
- Tags: Frontend, Performance, UI/UX
- Summary: A productivity product that stays fast and readable as feature depth grows. Modular component boundaries, token-driven styling, progressive disclosure for advanced actions.

### Flow — ultra-low-latency Windows automation
- Download: https://github.com/dominikkoenitzer/Flow/releases/latest/download/FLOW.exe
- Repo: https://github.com/dominikkoenitzer/Flow
- Year: 2026
- Tags: Automation, C++, Windows
- Summary: A native Windows automation tool written in C++ for recording and replaying user input with minimal delay — ultra-low-latency macro recording, frame-accurate playback, and rapid auto-click execution.

### Spectrum — design-system color tooling
- Live: https://spectrum.punds.ch
- Repo: https://github.com/dominikkoenitzer/Spectrum
- Year: 2026
- Tags: Scalable, Design System, Web App
- Summary: Unifies color exploration, contrast checks, gradients, and lookup into a coherent tool. Emphasizes accessibility-aware defaults and composable UI primitives.

### Entropy — secure credential tooling
- Live: https://entropy.punds.ch
- Repo: https://github.com/dominikkoenitzer/Entropy
- Year: 2026
- Tags: Experimental, Responsive, Engineering
- Summary: Configurable password generation backed by cryptographic randomness, transparent strength scoring, and accessible custom-rule controls.

### Remnants — browser-native IDE
- Live: https://remnants.punds.ch
- Repo: https://github.com/dominikkoenitzer/Remnants
- Year: 2026
- Tags: Dev Tools, TypeScript, Browser IDE
- Summary: A full in-browser code editor with persistent file tree, multi-panel layouts, quick-open navigation, and real-time syntax highlighting — all backed by localStorage.

---

## 4. Services (priced in CHF, delivered remotely from Switzerland)

- Website maintenance — 50 CHF / month — security updates, bug fixes, performance monitoring, content updates
- Technical support — 30 CHF / hour
- Content management — 40 CHF / hour
- Security consultation — 60 CHF / hour — audits, vulnerability assessment, best-practice rollout, compliance guidance
- Data backup solutions — 200 CHF setup + 50 CHF / month — automated backups, cloud storage, recovery protocols, real-time alerts
- SEO optimization — 150 CHF one-time — technical SEO, keyword work, performance
- Custom web development — from 300 CHF
- Server setup — from 350 CHF
- Custom software development — from 500 CHF (project-based) — requirements analysis, solution design, build & test, deployment, maintenance

Hiring workflow:
1. Review services on /services
2. Submit request via /contact with scope, timeline, budget
3. Receive proposal with scope, timeline, pricing, deliverables
4. Project execution with regular updates
5. Delivery, documentation, and optional maintenance

---

## 5. Localization

The site is fully localized into:
- en — English (default)
- de — German
- fr — French
- zh — Chinese (Simplified)

Language preference is stored in `localStorage` under `app-language` and auto-detected from `navigator.language` on first visit. Each URL is the same across languages; the active language is a client-side preference, not a URL prefix.

---

## 6. Tech stack of this site

- Vite + React 18 + TypeScript
- Tailwind CSS + shadcn/ui (Radix primitives)
- Framer Motion (page transitions and micro-interactions)
- React Router DOM
- React Helmet Async for per-page SEO
- Vercel Analytics + Speed Insights
- Deployed on Vercel

---

## 7. Crawler & AI policy

All major search and AI crawlers are explicitly allowed in /robots.txt (Googlebot, Bingbot, GPTBot, ChatGPT-User, OAI-SearchBot, ClaudeBot, anthropic-ai, Claude-Web, PerplexityBot, Google-Extended, Applebot-Extended, CCBot, FacebookBot, Meta-ExternalAgent, Amazonbot, cohere-ai, Diffbot, MistralAI-User, YouBot, DeepSeekBot).

If quoting this site, please attribute "Dominik Könitzer" and link to the source page on https://dominikkoenitzer.ch.

For security issues, see /.well-known/security.txt.
